blocks.content: In truth, Overflow isn't such a big deal.
To the average person, it may seem like the eccentricity of a genius,
but if you were to visit the Royal Magic Academy, it would be full of such kids.
Only those who stood out from the crowd and then fought through fierce competition could even begin to be recognized as geniuses in the world of talent.
Still, since she had taken on the task, Olivia couldn't just handle it carelessly,
Olivia walked towards Dante with a smile that made many students fall in love.
